tagline: Professional Full-Service Pool Care for the Valley

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves the Owner's
Personal Touch
hero.subheadline: For nearly two decades, owner Nick Stellern has personally maintained pools across the Northwest Valley. No rotating crews, no cutting corners — just one experienced professional who treats your pool like his own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">One Trusted Professional
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency green pool rescues, Nick handles every aspect of your pool care personally — so you never have to wonder who's showing up.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough weekly service including chemical balancing, water level checks, surface and bottom debris removal, and full equipment inspection to keep your pool sparkling year-round.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs & Installations
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, motors, filters, and heaters. Honest assessments that save you money — we fix what's broken, not what isn't.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleanups
cards.description: Complete restoration of green, neglected, or algae-filled pools back to crystal-clear condition. Chemical treatment, deep scrubbing, and filtration — your pool recovered fast.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Service
cards.description: Professional cleaning of cartridge, sand, and DE filters to ensure optimal water clarity and extend the life of your filtration equipment.

cards.title: Pool Light Replacement
cards.description: Safe replacement of underwater pool and spa lights, including energy-efficient LED upgrades for better visibility and nighttime ambiance.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Maintenance
cards.description: Full-service care for in-ground spas and hot tubs including water chemistry balancing, jet cleaning, and equipment checks to keep your spa relaxation-ready.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll schedule a free on-site evaluation. Nick will assess your pool's condition and provide an honest, no-pressure quote.

steps.title: Nick Handles Everything
steps.description: As a CPO-certified owner-operator, Nick personally services your pool on a consistent schedule. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment — every detail covered.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Arizona Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready through every Arizona season. If anything isn't perfect, Nick comes back and makes it right — no questions asked.

about.label: Why Valley Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: Not a Franchise — Your Dedicated Pool Professional Since 2007
about.description: Founded by Nick Stellern in 2007, Aqua Del Sol Pool Care has spent nearly two decades earning the trust of homeowners across the Northwest Valley. As an owner-operated business, Nick personally maintains every pool on his route — no subcontractors, no inexperienced helpers. He uses only the cleanest, safest chemicals available, because your family and pets deserve nothing less.

features.title: Owner-Operated, Every Visit
features.description: Nick personally services your pool — the same experienced professional every week. No strangers, no surprises.

features.title: Family & Pet Safe Chemicals
features.description: We use only the cleanest, safest pool chemicals available. Gentle on skin, safe for pets, tough on algae.

features.title: Honest Diagnostics, Real Savings
features.description: We fix what's actually broken, not what pays us more. Our customers routinely save hundreds on repairs other companies would have replaced.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we quote based on your pool's size and needs. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts — just honest pricing for reliable service.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, Nick will return and re-service your pool at no additional charge. We've built our reputation on 19 years of keeping our word — and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within a few days. For green pool emergencies, Nick offers same-day or next-day response. Just give us a call at 602-866-1526 and we'll get you set up.

faqs.question: Will the same person service my pool every time?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Nick personally handles every pool on his route — that's the Aqua Del Sol difference. You'll never have a random technician show up unannounced.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Glendale, North Phoenix, North Scottsdale, Cave Creek, DC Ranch, Peoria, Surprise, Sun City, and the greater Northwest Valley. If you're in the area, give us a call to confirm coverage.

faqs.question: Are the chemicals you use safe for kids and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes. We specifically choose the cleanest, safest pool chemicals available. They're effective at keeping your water crystal clear while being gentle on skin and safe for pets and children.

faqs.question: Do I need a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We don't do contracts at Aqua Del Sol. We earn your business every single visit. You can adjust or cancel your service anytime with zero fees or penalties.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Nick has been maintaining our pool for over three years now and we couldn't be happier. He's always on time, communicates well, and our pool has never looked better. Highly recommend Aqua Del Sol!

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: After trying two other pool companies, we finally found Aqua Del Sol. Nick is honest, reliable, and really knows his stuff. He fixed an issue with our pump that another company said required a full replacement. Saved us hundreds of dollars.

testimonials.name: Jennifer K.
testimonials.text: We moved into a house with a green pool and Nick had it looking perfect within a week. He's been our regular pool guy ever since. Great service and very fair pricing for the quality of work.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That's
Always Swim-Ready?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool evaluation from Nick himself. No contracts, no pressure — just honest advice from a 19-year pool care veteran.
benefits: Owner-operator — Nick handles your pool personally
